installation.script:
#!/bin/bash
set -euo pipefail

log() { echo "[INSTALL] $*"; }
warn() { echo "[WARN] $*"; }
fail() { echo "[ERROR] $*"; exit 1; }

run_with_heartbeat() {
  local label="$1"
  shift
  local heartbeat_seconds="${INSTALL_HEARTBEAT_SECONDS:-20}"

  "$@" &
  local cmd_pid=$!

  while kill -0 "$cmd_pid" 2>/dev/null; do
    sleep "$heartbeat_seconds"
    if kill -0 "$cmd_pid" 2>/dev/null; then
      log "${label} still running..."
    fi
  done

  wait "$cmd_pid"
}

cd /mnt/server

PTERO_PERSIST_ROOT=/mnt/server/.ptero-persist
PTERO_PERSIST_BIN="${PTERO_PERSIST_ROOT}/bin"
PTERO_PERSIST_CACHE="${PTERO_PERSIST_ROOT}/cache"
INSTALL_TMP_ROOT=/mnt/server/.install-tmp
mkdir -p "$INSTALL_TMP_ROOT" "$PTERO_PERSIST_BIN" "$PTERO_PERSIST_CACHE"

cleanup_temp_caches() {
  rm -rf "$INSTALL_TMP_ROOT"
}
trap cleanup_temp_caches EXIT

export NPM_CONFIG_CACHE="${PTERO_PERSIST_CACHE}/.npm-cache"
export npm_config_cache="${PTERO_PERSIST_CACHE}/.npm-cache"
export npm_config_update_notifier=false
export npm_config_fund=false
export npm_config_audit=false
export npm_config_progress=false
export npm_config_jobs="${npm_config_jobs:-1}"
export CHILD_CONCURRENCY="${CHILD_CONCURRENCY:-1}"
if ! printf '%s' "${NODE_OPTIONS:-}" | grep -Eq '(^| )--max-old-space-size='; then
  export NODE_OPTIONS="--max-old-space-size=${PTERO_NODE_MEMORY_MB:-384}${NODE_OPTIONS:+ $NODE_OPTIONS}"
fi
export YARN_CACHE_FOLDER="${PTERO_PERSIST_CACHE}/.yarn-cache"
export COMPOSER_CACHE_DIR="${PTERO_PERSIST_CACHE}/.composer-cache"
export PNPM_HOME="${PTERO_PERSIST_CACHE}/.pnpm-home"
export BUN_INSTALL_CACHE_DIR="${PTERO_PERSIST_CACHE}/.bun-cache"
export PLAYWRIGHT_BROWSERS_PATH="${PTERO_PERSIST_CACHE}/.playwright"
export PLAYWRIGHT_SKIP_BROWSER_DOWNLOAD="${PLAYWRIGHT_SKIP_BROWSER_DOWNLOAD:-1}"
export PUPPETEER_CACHE_DIR="${PTERO_PERSIST_CACHE}/.puppeteer"
export PUPPETEER_SKIP_DOWNLOAD="${PUPPETEER_SKIP_DOWNLOAD:-1}"
export CYPRESS_CACHE_FOLDER="${PTERO_PERSIST_CACHE}/.cypress"
export CYPRESS_INSTALL_BINARY="${CYPRESS_INSTALL_BINARY:-0}"
export ELECTRON_CACHE="${PTERO_PERSIST_CACHE}/.electron"
export ELECTRON_SKIP_BINARY_DOWNLOAD="${ELECTRON_SKIP_BINARY_DOWNLOAD:-1}"
mkdir -p "$NPM_CONFIG_CACHE" "$PTERO_PERSIST_CACHE/.pnpm-store" "$YARN_CACHE_FOLDER" "$BUN_INSTALL_CACHE_DIR" "$COMPOSER_CACHE_DIR" "$PLAYWRIGHT_BROWSERS_PATH" "$PUPPETEER_CACHE_DIR" "$CYPRESS_CACHE_FOLDER" "$ELECTRON_CACHE" "$PNPM_HOME"
export NEXT_TELEMETRY_DISABLED=1
DEPLOY_PROFILE="$(echo "${DEPLOY_PROFILE:-auto}" | tr '[:upper:]' '[:lower:]')"
PACKAGE_MANAGER="$(echo "${PACKAGE_MANAGER:-auto}" | tr '[:upper:]' '[:lower:]')"
AUTO_BUILD="1"
STATIC_DIR_VALUE="${STATIC_DIR:-auto}"
GIT_BRANCH="${GIT_BRANCH:-main}"
APP_ROOT_VALUE="${APP_ROOT:-auto}"
BACKEND_ROOT_VALUE="${BACKEND_ROOT:-auto}"

case "$DEPLOY_PROFILE" in
  auto|next|node|bun|laravel|php|static|custom) ;;
  *) fail "DEPLOY_PROFILE must be one of: auto,next,node,bun,laravel,php,static,custom." ;;
esac

case "$PACKAGE_MANAGER" in
  auto|npm|pnpm|yarn|bun|composer) ;;
  *) fail "PACKAGE_MANAGER must be one of: auto,npm,pnpm,yarn,bun,composer." ;;
esac

if [ -z "${GIT_REPO_URL:-}" ]; then
  fail "GIT_REPO_URL is required."
fi

if ! [[ "$GIT_REPO_URL" =~ ^https:// ]]; then
  fail "Only HTTPS repository URLs are supported."
fi

log "Installing base packages..."
apt-get update -y
DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends \
  ca-certificates curl git jq unzip xz-utils bash php-cli php-mbstring php-xml php-curl php-zip composer

extract_github_parts() {
  local raw="$1"
  raw="${raw#https://github.com/}"
  raw="${raw%.git}"
  local owner="${raw%%/*}"
  local repo="${raw#*/}"
  if [ "$owner" = "$repo" ] || [ -z "$owner" ] || [ -z "$repo" ]; then
    return 1
  fi
  printf "%s %s\n" "$owner" "$repo"
}

if [[ "$GIT_REPO_URL" =~ ^https://github\.com/ ]]; then
  if parts="$(extract_github_parts "$GIT_REPO_URL" 2>/dev/null)"; then
    OWNER="$(echo "$parts" | awk '{print $1}')"
    REPO="$(echo "$parts" | awk '{print $2}')"
    if [ -z "${GITHUB_TOKEN:-}" ]; then
      API_URL="https://api.github.com/repos/${OWNER}/${REPO}"
      API_BODY="$(curl -fsSL "$API_URL" 2>/dev/null || true)"
      if echo "$API_BODY" | grep -q '"private":[[:space:]]*true'; then
        fail "Repository appears private. Set GITHUB_TOKEN and reinstall."
      fi
    fi
  fi
fi

TMP_CLONE="$INSTALL_TMP_ROOT/ptero-repo"
ASKPASS="$INSTALL_TMP_ROOT/ptero-git-askpass.sh"
rm -rf "$TMP_CLONE"
mkdir -p "$TMP_CLONE"

cat > "$ASKPASS" <<'ASKPASS_SCRIPT'
#!/bin/sh
case "$1" in
  *Username*) echo "x-access-token" ;;
  *Password*) echo "$GITHUB_TOKEN" ;;
  *) echo "" ;;
esac
ASKPASS_SCRIPT
chmod 700 "$ASKPASS"

log "Updating repository (branch: ${GIT_BRANCH})..."
cd /mnt/server

# Set safe directory because pterodactyl runs as root/container user optionally
git config --global --add safe.directory /mnt/server

if [ -n "${GITHUB_TOKEN:-}" ] && [[ "$GIT_REPO_URL" =~ ^https://github\.com/ ]]; then
  export GIT_ASKPASS="$ASKPASS"
  export GIT_TERMINAL_PROMPT=0
fi

if [ -d .git ] && git remote get-url origin >/dev/null 2>&1; then
  log "Existing git repository found. Fetching updates..."
  if ! git fetch origin "$GIT_BRANCH"; then
    warn "Failed to fetch origin. Trying to force remote..."
    git remote set-url origin "$GIT_REPO_URL"
    git fetch origin "$GIT_BRANCH" || fail "Git fetch failed."
  fi
  git reset --hard "origin/$GIT_BRANCH"
else
  log "Initializing new git repository..."
  rm -rf .git
  git init
  git remote add origin "$GIT_REPO_URL"
  if ! git fetch origin "$GIT_BRANCH"; then
    fail "Git fetch failed. Check URL, branch, or token permissions."
  fi
  git reset --hard "origin/$GIT_BRANCH"
  git branch -M "$GIT_BRANCH" || true
fi
rm -f "$ASKPASS"
cd /mnt/server

path_package_has() {
  local dir="$1"
  local pkg="$2"
  [ -f "$dir/package.json" ] || return 1
  jq -e --arg pkg "$pkg" '((.dependencies // {})[$pkg] // (.devDependencies // {})[$pkg] // (.peerDependencies // {})[$pkg] // (.optionalDependencies // {})[$pkg]) != null' "$dir/package.json" >/dev/null 2>&1
}

path_script_exists() {
  local dir="$1"
  local script_name="$2"
  [ -f "$dir/package.json" ] || return 1
  [ -n "$(jq -r --arg script "$script_name" '.scripts[$script] // empty' "$dir/package.json" 2>/dev/null)" ]
}

path_is_workspace_root() {
  local dir="$1"
  [ -f "$dir/package.json" ] || return 1
  jq -e '(.workspaces // empty) != empty' "$dir/package.json" >/dev/null 2>&1
}

dir_has_frontend_signature() {
  local dir="$1"
  [ -d "$dir" ] || return 1

  if [ -f "$dir/package.json" ]; then
    path_package_has "$dir" "next" && return 0
    path_package_has "$dir" "vite" && return 0
    path_package_has "$dir" "react" && return 0
    path_package_has "$dir" "react-dom" && return 0
    path_package_has "$dir" "vue" && return 0
    path_package_has "$dir" "astro" && return 0
    path_package_has "$dir" "nuxt" && return 0
    path_package_has "$dir" "@sveltejs/kit" && return 0
    path_package_has "$dir" "solid-js" && return 0
    path_package_has "$dir" "preact" && return 0
    path_package_has "$dir" "@angular/core" && return 0
    path_package_has "$dir" "@remix-run/react" && return 0
    path_script_exists "$dir" "preview" && return 0
    if path_script_exists "$dir" "build" && [ -f "$dir/index.html" ]; then
      return 0
    fi
  fi

  [ -f "$dir/index.html" ] && return 0
  return 1
}

dir_has_backend_signature() {
  local dir="$1"
  [ -d "$dir" ] || return 1

  [ -f "$dir/artisan" ] && return 0

  if [ "$dir" = "." ] && path_is_workspace_root "$dir"; then
    return 1
  fi

  if [ -f "$dir/package.json" ]; then
    path_package_has "$dir" "express" && return 0
    path_package_has "$dir" "fastify" && return 0
    path_package_has "$dir" "@nestjs/core" && return 0
    path_package_has "$dir" "koa" && return 0
    path_package_has "$dir" "hono" && return 0
    path_package_has "$dir" "@hono/node-server" && return 0
    path_package_has "$dir" "socket.io" && return 0
    path_package_has "$dir" "@adonisjs/core" && return 0
    path_package_has "$dir" "@remix-run/serve" && return 0
    path_package_has "$dir" "@remix-run/node" && return 0
    if ! dir_has_frontend_signature "$dir" && path_script_exists "$dir" "start" && [ ! -f "$dir/index.html" ]; then
      return 0
    fi
  fi

  if [ -f "$dir/composer.json" ] || [ -f "$dir/index.php" ]; then
    return 0
  fi

  return 1
}

resolve_app_root() {
  if [ -n "$APP_ROOT_VALUE" ] && [ "$APP_ROOT_VALUE" != "auto" ]; then
    echo "$APP_ROOT_VALUE"
    return
  fi

  if dir_has_frontend_signature "."; then
    echo "."
    return
  fi

  for candidate in frontend client web ui app apps/web apps/frontend apps/client packages/web packages/frontend packages/client sites/web sites/frontend; do
    if dir_has_frontend_signature "$candidate"; then
      echo "$candidate"
      return
    fi
  done

  while IFS= read -r manifest; do
    local dir
    dir="$(dirname "$manifest")"
    dir="${dir#./}"
    [ -n "$dir" ] || dir="."
    [ "$dir" = "." ] && continue
    case "$dir" in
      .git|node_modules|dist|build|coverage|tmp|temp|vendor|tools|tools/*|scripts|scripts/*|docs|docs/*|examples|examples/*|example|example/*|test|test/*|tests|tests/*|spec|spec/*|specs|specs/*)
        continue
        ;;
    esac
    if dir_has_frontend_signature "$dir"; then
      echo "$dir"
      return
    fi
  done < <(find . -maxdepth 4 -type f -name package.json | sort)

  if [ -f "./artisan" ] || [ -f "./composer.json" ] || [ -f "./index.php" ] || [ -f "./package.json" ] || [ -f "./index.html" ]; then
    echo "."
    return
  fi

  echo "."
}

resolve_backend_root() {
  local app_root="$1"

  if [ -n "$BACKEND_ROOT_VALUE" ] && [ "$BACKEND_ROOT_VALUE" != "auto" ]; then
    if [ "$BACKEND_ROOT_VALUE" = "." ] || [ -n "$BACKEND_ROOT_VALUE" ]; then
      echo "$BACKEND_ROOT_VALUE"
      return
    fi
  fi

  for candidate in backend api server apps/api apps/backend services/api services/backend packages/api packages/backend; do
    if [ "$candidate" != "$app_root" ] && dir_has_backend_signature "$candidate"; then
      echo "$candidate"
      return
    fi
  done

  if [ "$app_root" != "." ] && dir_has_backend_signature "."; then
    echo "."
    return
  fi

  while IFS= read -r path; do
    local dir
    dir="$(dirname "$path")"
    dir="${dir#./}"
    [ -n "$dir" ] || dir="."
    [ "$dir" = "$app_root" ] && continue
    case "$dir" in
      .git|node_modules|dist|build|coverage|tmp|temp|vendor|tools|tools/*|scripts|scripts/*|docs|docs/*|examples|examples/*|example|example/*|test|test/*|tests|tests/*|spec|spec/*|specs|specs/*)
        continue
        ;;
    esac
    if dir_has_backend_signature "$dir"; then
      echo "$dir"
      return
    fi
  done < <(find . -maxdepth 4 \( -type f -name package.json -o -type f -name composer.json -o -type f -name artisan -o -type f -name index.php \) | sort)

  echo ""
}

escape_env_value() {
  printf '%s' "$1" | sed 's/\\/\\\\/g; s/"/\\"/g'
}

write_env_key() {
  local file="$1"
  local key="$2"
  local value="${3:-}"
  [ -n "$value" ] || return 0

  local escaped
  escaped="$(escape_env_value "$value")"

  if grep -Eq "^${key}=" "$file"; then
    sed -i "s|^${key}=.*|${key}=\"${escaped}\"|" "$file"
  else
    printf '%s="%s"\n' "$key" "$escaped" >> "$file"
  fi
}

write_meta_env() {
  local resolved_profile="${1:-}"
  local resolved_js_pm="${2:-}"
  local resolved_static_dir="${3:-}"

  mkdir -p /mnt/server/.ptero
  cat > /mnt/server/.ptero/meta.env <<EOF
PTERO_PROFILE=${resolved_profile}
PTERO_JS_PM=${resolved_js_pm}
PTERO_STATIC_DIR=${resolved_static_dir}
PTERO_APP_ROOT=${APP_ROOT_VALUE}
PTERO_BACKEND_ROOT=${BACKEND_ROOT_VALUE}
EOF
}

write_env_debug() {
  mkdir -p /mnt/server/.ptero
  cat > /mnt/server/.ptero/env.debug <<EOF
DEPLOY_PROFILE=${DEPLOY_PROFILE}
PACKAGE_MANAGER=${PACKAGE_MANAGER}
GIT_BRANCH=${GIT_BRANCH}
APP_ROOT=${APP_ROOT:-}
APP_ROOT_RESOLVED=${APP_ROOT_VALUE}
APP_PORT=${APP_PORT:-}
BACKEND_ROOT=${BACKEND_ROOT:-}
BACKEND_ROOT_RESOLVED=${BACKEND_ROOT_VALUE}
BACKEND_PORT=${BACKEND_PORT:-3001}
DB_HOST=${DB_HOST:-}
DB_PORT=${DB_PORT:-}
DB_NAME=${DB_NAME:-}
DB_USER=${DB_USER:-}
PTERO_PERSIST_ROOT=${PTERO_PERSIST_ROOT}
CF_TUNNEL_ENABLE=${CF_TUNNEL_ENABLE:-0}
EOF
}

resolve_cloudflared_arch() {
  local raw_arch="${1:-$(uname -m)}"
  case "$raw_arch" in
    x86_64|amd64) echo "amd64" ;;
    aarch64|arm64) echo "arm64" ;;
    *)
      warn "Unknown architecture '${raw_arch}', defaulting cloudflared to amd64."
      echo "amd64"
      ;;
  esac
}

download_cloudflared_binary() {
  local target="$1"
  local arch="$2"
  local url="https://github.com/cloudflare/cloudflared/releases/latest/download/cloudflared-linux-${arch}"
  local temp_target="${target}.tmp"

  mkdir -p "$(dirname "$target")"

  if curl --retry 3 --retry-delay 2 --retry-all-errors -fsSL "$url" -o "$temp_target"; then
    chmod +x "$temp_target"
    mv "$temp_target" "$target"
    return 0
  fi

  rm -f "$temp_target"
  return 1
}

link_cloudflared_binary() {
  mkdir -p /mnt/server/.ptero
  ln -snf "$PTERO_PERSIST_BIN/cloudflared" /mnt/server/.ptero/cloudflared
}

ensure_cloudflared_bootstrap() {
  local arch
  arch="$(resolve_cloudflared_arch)"

  link_cloudflared_binary

  if [ -x "$PTERO_PERSIST_BIN/cloudflared" ]; then
    log "cloudflared bootstrap is ready from persistent storage."
    return 0
  fi

  if download_cloudflared_binary "$PTERO_PERSIST_BIN/cloudflared" "$arch"; then
    link_cloudflared_binary
    log "cloudflared downloaded successfully."
    return 0
  fi

  warn "Failed to bootstrap cloudflared. Tunnel runtime will retry on server start."
  return 1
}


prepare_env_in_dir() {
  local dir="$1"
  [ -n "$dir" ] || return 0
  [ -d "$dir" ] || return 0

  local env_file="$dir/.env"

  if [ -f "$env_file" ]; then
    :
  elif [ -f "$dir/.env.example" ]; then
    cp "$dir/.env.example" "$env_file"
  elif [ -f "$dir/.env.production" ]; then
    cp "$dir/.env.production" "$env_file"
  elif [ -f "$dir/.env.local.example" ]; then
    cp "$dir/.env.local.example" "$env_file"
  else
    # Create a minimal .env file if none exists but we need to set vars
    touch "$env_file"
  fi

  # Inject BACKEND_PORT and public framework variants at build time.
  # This ensures Next.js/Vite frontends can read the backend port from env
  # without hardcoding it. User still controls API_URL in their .env file.
  if [ -n "${BACKEND_PORT:-}" ]; then
    write_env_key "$env_file" "BACKEND_PORT"             "${BACKEND_PORT}"
    write_env_key "$env_file" "NEXT_PUBLIC_BACKEND_PORT" "${BACKEND_PORT}"
    write_env_key "$env_file" "VITE_BACKEND_PORT"        "${BACKEND_PORT}"
    write_env_key "$env_file" "REACT_APP_BACKEND_PORT"   "${BACKEND_PORT}"
  fi

  # Inject DB credentials from admin panel hidden vars only if set.
  # All other config (API_URL, DATABASE_URL, etc.) must be in repo .env file.
  write_env_key "$env_file" "DB_HOST"     "${DB_HOST:-}"
  write_env_key "$env_file" "DB_PORT"     "${DB_PORT:-}"
  write_env_key "$env_file" "DB_DATABASE" "${DB_NAME:-}"
  write_env_key "$env_file" "DB_USERNAME" "${DB_USER:-}"
  write_env_key "$env_file" "DB_PASSWORD" "${DB_PASS:-}"
}


APP_ROOT_VALUE="$(resolve_app_root)"
BACKEND_ROOT_VALUE="$(resolve_backend_root "$APP_ROOT_VALUE")"

[ -n "$APP_ROOT_VALUE" ] || fail "Unable to resolve APP_ROOT from repository."
[ -d "/mnt/server/$APP_ROOT_VALUE" ] || fail "APP_ROOT '${APP_ROOT_VALUE}' does not exist in repository."

if [ -n "$BACKEND_ROOT_VALUE" ] && [ ! -d "/mnt/server/$BACKEND_ROOT_VALUE" ]; then
  fail "BACKEND_ROOT '${BACKEND_ROOT_VALUE}' does not exist in repository."
fi

log "Resolved app root: ${APP_ROOT_VALUE}"
if [ -n "$BACKEND_ROOT_VALUE" ]; then
  log "Resolved backend root: ${BACKEND_ROOT_VALUE}"
fi

prepare_env_in_dir "/mnt/server/$APP_ROOT_VALUE"
if [ -n "$BACKEND_ROOT_VALUE" ] && [ "$BACKEND_ROOT_VALUE" != "$APP_ROOT_VALUE" ]; then
  prepare_env_in_dir "/mnt/server/$BACKEND_ROOT_VALUE"
fi

log "Phase: bootstrap ptero"
mkdir -p /mnt/server/.ptero
write_meta_env "" "" ""
write_env_debug
cat > /mnt/server/.ptero/start.sh <<'START_SCRIPT'
#!/bin/sh
set -eu

log() { echo "[START] $*"; }
warn() { echo "[START][WARN] $*"; }
fail() { echo "[START][ERROR] $*"; exit 1; }

run_with_heartbeat() {
  label="$1"
  shift
  heartbeat_seconds="${RUNTIME_HEARTBEAT_SECONDS:-20}"

  "$@" &
  cmd_pid=$!

  while kill -0 "$cmd_pid" 2>/dev/null; do
    sleep "$heartbeat_seconds"
    if kill -0 "$cmd_pid" 2>/dev/null; then
      log "${label} still running..."
    fi
  done

  wait "$cmd_pid"
}

if [ -f "/home/container/.ptero/meta.env" ]; then
  . /home/container/.ptero/meta.env
fi

APP_ROOT_RUNTIME="${APP_ROOT:-}"
BACKEND_ROOT_RUNTIME="${BACKEND_ROOT:-}"

if [ -z "$APP_ROOT_RUNTIME" ] || [ "$APP_ROOT_RUNTIME" = "auto" ]; then
  APP_ROOT_RUNTIME="${PTERO_APP_ROOT:-.}"
fi

if [ -z "$APP_ROOT_RUNTIME" ] || [ "$APP_ROOT_RUNTIME" = "auto" ]; then
  APP_ROOT_RUNTIME="."
fi

if [ -z "$BACKEND_ROOT_RUNTIME" ] || [ "$BACKEND_ROOT_RUNTIME" = "auto" ]; then
  BACKEND_ROOT_RUNTIME="${PTERO_BACKEND_ROOT:-}"
fi

if [ "$BACKEND_ROOT_RUNTIME" = "auto" ]; then
  BACKEND_ROOT_RUNTIME=""
fi

if [ ! -d "/home/container/${APP_ROOT_RUNTIME}" ]; then
  fail "APP_ROOT '${APP_ROOT_RUNTIME}' does not exist in runtime container."
fi

cd "/home/container/${APP_ROOT_RUNTIME}"

normalize() {
  echo "$1" | tr '[:upper:]' '[:lower:]'
}

DEPLOY_PROFILE_VALUE="$(normalize "${DEPLOY_PROFILE:-auto}")"
PACKAGE_MANAGER_VALUE="$(normalize "${PACKAGE_MANAGER:-auto}")"
ALLOCATED_PORT="${PORT:-${SERVER_PORT:-3000}}"
if [ -n "${APP_PORT:-}" ] && [ "${APP_PORT}" != "${ALLOCATED_PORT}" ]; then
  warn "APP_PORT=${APP_PORT} does not match the Pterodactyl allocation ${ALLOCATED_PORT}. Using the allocation port for the main web process."
fi
APP_EFFECTIVE_PORT="${ALLOCATED_PORT}"
TUNNEL_TARGET_PORT="${APP_EFFECTIVE_PORT}"

export PORT="${APP_EFFECTIVE_PORT}"
export SERVER_PORT="${APP_EFFECTIVE_PORT}"
export APP_PORT="${APP_EFFECTIVE_PORT}"
export FRONTEND_PORT="${APP_EFFECTIVE_PORT}"
export HOST="${HOST:-0.0.0.0}"
export CF_TUNNEL_TARGET_PORT="${TUNNEL_TARGET_PORT}"

# Backend port — user MUST open a second port allocation in Pterodactyl panel.
# All other env vars (API_URL, DATABASE_URL, etc.) come from the repo .env file.
export BACKEND_PORT="${BACKEND_PORT:-3001}"
export API_PORT="${BACKEND_PORT}"
# Public framework variants — so Next.js/Vite can read backend port at runtime
export NEXT_PUBLIC_BACKEND_PORT="${BACKEND_PORT}"
export VITE_BACKEND_PORT="${BACKEND_PORT}"
export REACT_APP_BACKEND_PORT="${BACKEND_PORT}"

log "Environment configured:"
log "  Frontend port        : ${APP_EFFECTIVE_PORT} (Pterodactyl container allocation)"
log "  Backend port         : ${BACKEND_PORT} (must be allocated in panel for public access)"
log "  NEXT_PUBLIC_BACKEND_PORT exported for frontend build/runtime"
[ -n "${DB_HOST:-}" ] && export DATABASE_HOST="${DB_HOST}"
[ -n "${DB_PORT:-}" ] && export DATABASE_PORT="${DB_PORT}"
[ -n "${DB_NAME:-}" ] && export DB_DATABASE="${DB_NAME}" && export DATABASE_NAME="${DB_NAME}"
[ -n "${DB_USER:-}" ] && export DB_USERNAME="${DB_USER}" && export DATABASE_USER="${DB_USER}"
[ -n "${DB_PASS:-}" ] && export DB_PASSWORD="${DB_PASS}" && export DATABASE_PASSWORD="${DB_PASS}"
PTERO_PERSIST_ROOT_RUNTIME="/home/container/.ptero-persist"
PTERO_PERSIST_BIN_RUNTIME="${PTERO_PERSIST_ROOT_RUNTIME}/bin"
RUNTIME_CACHE_ROOT="${PTERO_PERSIST_ROOT_RUNTIME}/cache"
mkdir -p "$PTERO_PERSIST_BIN_RUNTIME" "$RUNTIME_CACHE_ROOT"
export NPM_CONFIG_CACHE="${RUNTIME_CACHE_ROOT}/.npm-cache"
export npm_config_cache="${RUNTIME_CACHE_ROOT}/.npm-cache"
export npm_config_update_notifier="false"
export npm_config_fund="false"
export npm_config_audit="false"
export npm_config_progress="false"
export npm_config_jobs="${npm_config_jobs:-1}"
export CHILD_CONCURRENCY="${CHILD_CONCURRENCY:-1}"
if ! printf '%s' "${NODE_OPTIONS:-}" | grep -Eq '(^| )--max-old-space-size='; then
  export NODE_OPTIONS="--max-old-space-size=${PTERO_NODE_MEMORY_MB:-384}${NODE_OPTIONS:+ $NODE_OPTIONS}"
fi
export YARN_CACHE_FOLDER="${RUNTIME_CACHE_ROOT}/.yarn-cache"
export PNPM_HOME="${RUNTIME_CACHE_ROOT}/.pnpm-home"
export BUN_INSTALL_CACHE_DIR="${RUNTIME_CACHE_ROOT}/.bun-cache"
export PLAYWRIGHT_BROWSERS_PATH="${RUNTIME_CACHE_ROOT}/.playwright"
export PLAYWRIGHT_SKIP_BROWSER_DOWNLOAD="${PLAYWRIGHT_SKIP_BROWSER_DOWNLOAD:-1}"
export PUPPETEER_CACHE_DIR="${RUNTIME_CACHE_ROOT}/.puppeteer"
export PUPPETEER_SKIP_DOWNLOAD="${PUPPETEER_SKIP_DOWNLOAD:-1}"
export CYPRESS_CACHE_FOLDER="${RUNTIME_CACHE_ROOT}/.cypress"
export CYPRESS_INSTALL_BINARY="${CYPRESS_INSTALL_BINARY:-0}"
export ELECTRON_CACHE="${RUNTIME_CACHE_ROOT}/.electron"
export ELECTRON_SKIP_BINARY_DOWNLOAD="${ELECTRON_SKIP_BINARY_DOWNLOAD:-1}"
mkdir -p "$NPM_CONFIG_CACHE" "$YARN_CACHE_FOLDER" "$PNPM_HOME" "$BUN_INSTALL_CACHE_DIR" "$PLAYWRIGHT_BROWSERS_PATH" "$PUPPETEER_CACHE_DIR" "$CYPRESS_CACHE_FOLDER" "$ELECTRON_CACHE" "$RUNTIME_CACHE_ROOT/.pnpm-store"
export NEXT_TELEMETRY_DISABLED=1
js_script_exists() {
  [ -f package.json ] || return 1
  grep -Eq "\"$1\"[[:space:]]*:" package.json
}

compact_package_json() {
  tr -d '\n\r\t' < package.json
}

js_script_contains() {
  [ -f package.json ] || return 1
  local script_name="$1"
  local pattern="$2"
  compact_package_json | grep -Eiq "\"${script_name}\"[[:space:]]*:[[:space:]]*\"[^\"]*${pattern}"
}

has_next_signature_runtime() {
  if [ -f next.config.js ] || [ -f next.config.mjs ] || [ -f next.config.ts ] || [ -d app ] || [ -d pages ] || [ -d .next ]; then
    return 0
  fi
  js_script_contains build 'next[[:space:]]+build' && return 0
  js_script_contains start 'next[[:space:]]+start' && return 0
  js_script_contains dev 'next[[:space:]]+dev' && return 0
  return 1
}

has_vite_signature_runtime() {
  if [ -f vite.config.js ] || [ -f vite.config.mjs ] || [ -f vite.config.ts ] || [ -f vite.config.cjs ]; then
    return 0
  fi
  grep -qi '"vite"' package.json 2>/dev/null && return 0
  js_script_contains build 'vite[[:space:]]+build' && return 0
  js_script_contains preview 'vite[[:space:]]+preview' && return 0
  return 1
}

js_script_exists_in_dir() {
  local dir="$1"
  local script_name="$2"
  [ -f "$dir/package.json" ] || return 1
  grep -Eq "\"$script_name\"[[:space:]]*:" "$dir/package.json"
}

detect_profile_runtime() {
  if [ "$DEPLOY_PROFILE_VALUE" != "auto" ]; then
    echo "$DEPLOY_PROFILE_VALUE"
    return
  fi

  if [ -n "${PTERO_PROFILE:-}" ]; then
    echo "$PTERO_PROFILE"
    return
  fi

  if [ -f artisan ]; then
    echo "laravel"
    return
  fi

  if [ -f package.json ]; then
    if has_vite_signature_runtime && js_script_contains build 'vite[[:space:]]+build'; then
      echo "static"
      return
    fi
    if grep -qi '"next"' package.json && has_next_signature_runtime; then
      echo "next"
      return
    fi
    if grep -qi '"@sveltejs/kit"' package.json; then
      if grep -qi '"@sveltejs/adapter-static"' package.json && ! js_script_exists start; then
        echo "static"
      else
        echo "node"
      fi
      return
    fi
    if grep -qi '"nuxt"' package.json || grep -qi '"nitropack"' package.json || grep -qi '"@remix-run/serve"' package.json || grep -qi '"@remix-run/node"' package.json; then
      echo "node"
      return
    fi
    if grep -qi '"astro"' package.json; then
      if grep -qi '"@astrojs/node"' package.json || js_script_exists start; then
        echo "node"
      else
        echo "static"
      fi
      return
    fi
    if has_vite_signature_runtime; then
      echo "static"
      return
    fi
    if js_script_exists start; then
      echo "node"
      return
    fi
    if js_script_exists preview || grep -qi '"vite"' package.json; then
      if js_script_exists build || [ -f index.html ] || [ -d public ]; then
        echo "static"
      else
        echo "node"
      fi
      return
    fi
    echo "node"
    return
  fi

  if [ -f composer.json ] || [ -f index.php ]; then
    echo "php"
    return
  fi

  echo "custom"
}

resolve_js_pm_runtime() {
  if [ "$PACKAGE_MANAGER_VALUE" != "auto" ] && [ "$PACKAGE_MANAGER_VALUE" != "composer" ]; then
    echo "$PACKAGE_MANAGER_VALUE"
    return
  fi

  if [ -n "${PTERO_JS_PM:-}" ] && [ "$PACKAGE_MANAGER_VALUE" = "auto" ]; then
    echo "$PTERO_JS_PM"
    return
  fi

  if [ -f bun.lockb ] || [ -f bun.lock ]; then
    echo "bun"
  elif [ -f pnpm-lock.yaml ]; then
    echo "pnpm"
  elif [ -f yarn.lock ]; then
    echo "yarn"
  elif [ -f package.json ]; then
    echo "npm"
  else
    echo "none"
  fi
}

resolve_js_pm_in_dir_runtime() {
  local dir="$1"

  if [ ! -f "$dir/package.json" ]; then
    echo "none"
    return
  fi

  if [ -f "$dir/bun.lockb" ] || [ -f "$dir/bun.lock" ]; then
    echo "bun"
  elif [ -f "$dir/pnpm-lock.yaml" ]; then
    echo "pnpm"
  elif [ -f "$dir/yarn.lock" ]; then
    echo "yarn"
  else
    echo "npm"
  fi
}

resolve_static_dir_runtime() {
  if [ "${STATIC_DIR:-auto}" != "auto" ]; then
    echo "${STATIC_DIR}"
    return
  fi

  if [ -n "${PTERO_STATIC_DIR:-}" ] && [ -d "${PTERO_STATIC_DIR}" ]; then
    echo "${PTERO_STATIC_DIR}"
    return
  fi

  for candidate in .vercel/output/static .output/public out dist build build/client .svelte-kit/output/client; do
    if [ -d "$candidate" ]; then
      echo "$candidate"
      return
    fi
  done

  if [ -f package.json ] && ( js_script_exists build || js_script_exists preview ); then
    echo ""
    return
  fi

  if [ ! -f package.json ] && [ -d public ]; then
    echo "public"
    return
  fi

  echo ""
}

prepare_pm() {
  pm="$1"
  if [ "$pm" = "pnpm" ] && ! command -v pnpm >/dev/null 2>&1; then
    if command -v corepack >/dev/null 2>&1; then
      corepack enable >/dev/null 2>&1 || true
      corepack prepare pnpm@latest --activate >/dev/null 2>&1 || true
    fi
  fi
  if [ "$pm" = "yarn" ] && ! command -v yarn >/dev/null 2>&1; then
    if command -v corepack >/dev/null 2>&1; then
      corepack enable >/dev/null 2>&1 || true
      corepack prepare yarn@stable --activate >/dev/null 2>&1 || true
    fi
  fi
}

link_runtime_cloudflared_binary() {
  mkdir -p /home/container/.ptero
  ln -snf "$PTERO_PERSIST_BIN_RUNTIME/cloudflared" /home/container/.ptero/cloudflared
}

resolve_cloudflared_arch_runtime() {
  local raw_arch="${1:-$(uname -m)}"
  case "$raw_arch" in
    x86_64|amd64) echo "amd64" ;;
    aarch64|arm64) echo "arm64" ;;
    *)
      warn "Unknown architecture '${raw_arch}', defaulting cloudflared to amd64."
      echo "amd64"
      ;;
  esac
}

download_cloudflared_binary_runtime() {
  local target="$1"
  local arch="$2"
  local url="https://github.com/cloudflare/cloudflared/releases/latest/download/cloudflared-linux-${arch}"
  local temp_target="${target}.tmp"

  mkdir -p "$(dirname "$target")"

  if command -v curl >/dev/null 2>&1; then
    if curl --retry 3 --retry-delay 2 --retry-all-errors -fsSL "$url" -o "$temp_target"; then
      chmod +x "$temp_target"
      mv "$temp_target" "$target"
      return 0
    fi
  elif command -v wget >/dev/null 2>&1; then
    if wget -qO "$temp_target" "$url"; then
      chmod +x "$temp_target"
      mv "$temp_target" "$target"
      return 0
    fi
  else
    warn "Neither curl nor wget is available in the runtime image, so cloudflared cannot be downloaded automatically."
    return 1
  fi

  rm -f "$temp_target"
  return 1
}

ensure_cloudflared_runtime_ready() {
  [ "${CF_TUNNEL_ENABLE:-0}" = "1" ] || return 0

  log "Phase: runtime recover cloudflared"
  link_runtime_cloudflared_binary

  if [ -x "/home/container/.ptero/cloudflared" ]; then
    return 0
  fi

  if [ -x "$PTERO_PERSIST_BIN_RUNTIME/cloudflared" ]; then
    link_runtime_cloudflared_binary
    return 0
  fi

  if download_cloudflared_binary_runtime "$PTERO_PERSIST_BIN_RUNTIME/cloudflared" "$(resolve_cloudflared_arch_runtime)"; then
    link_runtime_cloudflared_binary
    log "cloudflared restored for runtime startup."
    return 0
  fi

  warn "cloudflared could not be restored at runtime. Tunnel will be skipped."
  return 1
}

start_cloudflared_if_enabled() {
  local cloudflared_ready=0
  [ "${CF_TUNNEL_ENABLE:-0}" = "1" ] || return 0

  if ensure_cloudflared_runtime_ready; then
    cloudflared_ready=1
  fi

  if [ -z "${CF_TUNNEL_TOKEN:-}" ]; then
    warn "CF_TUNNEL_ENABLE=1 but CF_TUNNEL_TOKEN is empty. Skipping tunnel."
    return 0
  fi

  if [ "$cloudflared_ready" = "1" ] && [ -x "/home/container/.ptero/cloudflared" ]; then
    log "Starting Cloudflare Tunnel connector."
    log "Remote tunnel config should point to http://0.0.0.0:${TUNNEL_TARGET_PORT}."
    /home/container/.ptero/cloudflared --no-autoupdate tunnel run --token "${CF_TUNNEL_TOKEN}" > /home/container/.ptero/cloudflared.log 2>&1 &
    return 0
  fi

  warn "cloudflared binary is still unavailable after runtime recovery. Skipping tunnel."
  return 0
}

find_php_bin() {
  if command -v php >/dev/null 2>&1; then
    echo "php"
    return 0
  fi
  if command -v php8 >/dev/null 2>&1; then
    echo "php8"
    return 0
  fi
  return 1
}

run_js_script() {
  pm="$1"
  script_name="$2"
  shift 2

  case "$pm" in
    npm)
      exec npm run "$script_name" -- "$@"
      ;;
    pnpm)
      prepare_pm pnpm
      exec pnpm run "$script_name" -- "$@"
      ;;
    yarn)
      prepare_pm yarn
      exec yarn "$script_name" "$@"
      ;;
    bun)
      command -v bun >/dev/null 2>&1 || fail "bun package manager selected, but bun is missing in this image."
      exec bun run "$script_name" -- "$@"
      ;;
    *)
      fail "Unsupported JS package manager '${pm}'."
      ;;
  esac
}

run_js_install_runtime() {
  local pm="$1"
  local ORIGINAL_DIR="$(pwd)"
  if [ -f /home/container/package.json ] && grep -qa '"workspaces"' /home/container/package.json; then
    log "Workspace detected. Relocating to root for runtime installation..."
    cd /home/container
  fi

  case "$pm" in
    npm)
      if [ -f package-lock.json ]; then
        run_with_heartbeat "npm install" /bin/sh -lc "npm ci --prefer-offline --no-audit --no-fund || npm install --prefer-offline --no-audit --no-fund"
      else
        run_with_heartbeat "npm install" npm install --prefer-offline --no-audit --no-fund
      fi
      ;;
    pnpm)
      prepare_pm pnpm
      run_with_heartbeat "pnpm install" /bin/sh -lc "pnpm install --child-concurrency=1 --network-concurrency=8 --store-dir '$RUNTIME_CACHE_ROOT/.pnpm-store' --prefer-offline --frozen-lockfile || pnpm install --child-concurrency=1 --network-concurrency=8 --store-dir '$RUNTIME_CACHE_ROOT/.pnpm-store' --prefer-offline"
      ;;
    yarn)
      prepare_pm yarn
      run_with_heartbeat "yarn install" /bin/sh -lc "yarn install --prefer-offline --network-concurrency 8 --frozen-lockfile || yarn install --prefer-offline --network-concurrency 8"
      ;;
    bun)
      command -v bun >/dev/null 2>&1 || fail "bun package manager selected, but bun is missing in this image."
      run_with_heartbeat "bun install" bun install
      ;;
    none)
      fail "No JS package manager could be resolved for this project."
      ;;
    *)
      fail "Unsupported JS package manager '${pm}'."
      ;;
  esac

  cd "$ORIGINAL_DIR"
}

run_js_build_runtime() {
  pm="$1"
  js_script_exists build || return 1

  case "$pm" in
    npm)
      run_with_heartbeat "npm build" npm run build
      ;;
    pnpm)
      prepare_pm pnpm
      run_with_heartbeat "pnpm build" pnpm run build
      ;;
    yarn)
      prepare_pm yarn
      run_with_heartbeat "yarn build" yarn build
      ;;
    bun)
      command -v bun >/dev/null 2>&1 || fail "bun package manager selected, but bun is missing in this image."
      run_with_heartbeat "bun build" bun run build
      ;;
    *)
      fail "Unsupported JS package manager '${pm}' for build."
      ;;
  esac
}

ensure_js_runtime_ready() {
  [ -f package.json ] || return 0
  [ "$RUN_PM" != "none" ] || return 0

  needs_install="0"
  needs_build="0"

  if [ ! -d node_modules ]; then
    case "$RUN_PROFILE" in
      static)
        STATIC_ROOT_CHECK="$(resolve_static_dir_runtime)"
        if [ -z "$STATIC_ROOT_CHECK" ]; then
          needs_install="1"
        fi
        ;;
      next)
        if [ ! -f ".next/standalone/server.js" ] && [ ! -f ".next/BUILD_ID" ]; then
          needs_install="1"
        fi
        ;;
      *)
        needs_install="1"
        ;;
    esac
  fi
  if [ "$RUN_PROFILE" = "next" ] && [ ! -x ./node_modules/.bin/next ] && [ ! -f ".next/standalone/server.js" ]; then
    needs_install="1"
  fi

  if [ "$RUN_PROFILE" = "next" ] && [ ! -f ".next/standalone/server.js" ] && [ ! -f ".next/BUILD_ID" ] && js_script_exists build; then
    needs_build="1"
  fi

  if [ "$RUN_PROFILE" = "static" ]; then
    STATIC_ROOT_CHECK="$(resolve_static_dir_runtime)"
    if [ -z "$STATIC_ROOT_CHECK" ] && js_script_exists build; then
      needs_build="1"
    fi
  fi

  if [ "$needs_install" = "1" ] || [ "$needs_build" = "1" ]; then
    log "Phase: runtime recover JS dependencies"
  fi

  if [ "$needs_install" = "1" ]; then
    log "Installing JS dependencies at runtime because node_modules is missing or incomplete."
    run_js_install_runtime "$RUN_PM"
  fi

  if [ "$RUN_PROFILE" = "next" ] && [ "$needs_build" = "1" ]; then
    log "Building Next.js app at runtime because build output is missing."
    run_js_build_runtime "$RUN_PM"
    return 0
  fi

  if [ "$RUN_PROFILE" = "static" ] && [ "$needs_build" = "1" ]; then
    log "Building static frontend at runtime because build output is missing."
    run_js_build_runtime "$RUN_PM"
  fi
}

start_backend_if_needed() {
  if [ -z "${BACKEND_ROOT_RUNTIME:-}" ]; then
    return
  fi

  BACKEND_ROOT_EFFECTIVE="${BACKEND_ROOT_RUNTIME:-.}"
  if [ ! -d "/home/container/${BACKEND_ROOT_EFFECTIVE}" ]; then
    fail "BACKEND_ROOT '${BACKEND_ROOT_EFFECTIVE}' does not exist in runtime container."
  fi

  if [ -z "${BACKEND_START_CMD:-}" ] && [ "${BACKEND_ROOT_EFFECTIVE}" = "${APP_ROOT_RUNTIME}" ]; then
    warn "BACKEND_ROOT resolved to the same directory as APP_ROOT. Skipping automatic backend startup to avoid duplicating the main process. Set BACKEND_START_CMD to force a separate backend."
    return
  fi

  if [ -z "${BACKEND_PORT:-}" ]; then
    warn "BACKEND_PORT is empty, so automatic backend startup is skipped for ${BACKEND_ROOT_EFFECTIVE}. Set BACKEND_PORT and optionally BACKEND_START_CMD if this repo needs a separate backend process."
    return
  fi

  if [ -f "/home/container/${BACKEND_ROOT_EFFECTIVE}/artisan" ]; then
    PHP_BIN="$(find_php_bin || true)"
    [ -n "${PHP_BIN}" ] || fail "Backend Laravel/PHP app detected, but no PHP CLI binary exists in this image."
    log "Starting backend Laravel process from ${BACKEND_ROOT_EFFECTIVE}."
    (
      cd "/home/container/${BACKEND_ROOT_EFFECTIVE}"
      export PORT="${BACKEND_PORT}"
      export BACKEND_PORT="${BACKEND_PORT}"
      export HOST="0.0.0.0"
      exec "$PHP_BIN" artisan serve --host=0.0.0.0 --port="${BACKEND_PORT}"
    ) > /home/container/.ptero/backend.log 2>&1 &
  _BPID=$!
  sleep 1
  if kill -0 "$_BPID" 2>/dev/null; then
    log "Backend started (PID: ${_BPID}, port: ${BACKEND_PORT:-3001}). Tail: /home/container/.ptero/backend.log"
  else
    warn "Backend exited immediately. First lines:"
    head -20 /home/container/.ptero/backend.log 2>/dev/null | while IFS= read -r _bl; do warn "  [backend] $_bl"; done
  fi
    return
  fi

  if [ -f "/home/container/${BACKEND_ROOT_EFFECTIVE}/package.json" ]; then
    BACKEND_PM="$(resolve_js_pm_in_dir_runtime "/home/container/${BACKEND_ROOT_EFFECTIVE}")"

    if js_script_exists_in_dir "/home/container/${BACKEND_ROOT_EFFECTIVE}" start; then
      # WebSocket/socket.io detection
      if grep -qE '"(socket\.io|ws|uws|@nestjs/websockets)"' "/home/container/${BACKEND_ROOT_EFFECTIVE}/package.json" 2>/dev/null; then
        log "WebSocket library detected — ensure BACKEND_PORT is allocated in panel for WS connections."
      fi
  log "Starting backend JS process from ${BACKEND_ROOT_EFFECTIVE}."
      (
        cd "/home/container/${BACKEND_ROOT_EFFECTIVE}"
        export PORT="${BACKEND_PORT}"
        export BACKEND_PORT="${BACKEND_PORT}"
        export HOST="0.0.0.0"
        case "$BACKEND_PM" in
          npm)
            exec npm run start
            ;;
          pnpm)
            prepare_pm pnpm
            exec pnpm run start
            ;;
          yarn)
            prepare_pm yarn
            exec yarn start
            ;;
          bun)
            exec bun run start
            ;;
          *)
            exit 1
            ;;
        esac
      ) > /home/container/.ptero/backend.log 2>&1 &
      _BPID=$!
      sleep 1
      if kill -0 "$_BPID" 2>/dev/null; then
        log "Backend started (PID: ${_BPID}, port: ${BACKEND_PORT:-3001}). Tail: /home/container/.ptero/backend.log"
      else
        warn "Backend exited immediately. First lines:"
        head -20 /home/container/.ptero/backend.log 2>/dev/null | while IFS= read -r _bl; do warn "  [backend] $_bl"; done
      fi
      return
    fi

    for candidate in server.js server.mjs index.js index.mjs app.js app.mjs src/server.js src/index.js; do
      if [ -f "/home/container/${BACKEND_ROOT_EFFECTIVE}/${candidate}" ]; then
        log "Starting backend Node process from ${BACKEND_ROOT_EFFECTIVE}/${candidate}."
        (
          cd "/home/container/${BACKEND_ROOT_EFFECTIVE}"
          export PORT="${BACKEND_PORT}"
          export BACKEND_PORT="${BACKEND_PORT}"
          export HOST="0.0.0.0"
          exec node "$candidate"
        ) > /home/container/.ptero/backend.log 2>&1 &
        return
      fi
    done

    for candidate in server.ts index.ts app.ts src/server.ts src/index.ts; do
      if [ -f "/home/container/${BACKEND_ROOT_EFFECTIVE}/${candidate}" ] && command -v bun >/dev/null 2>&1; then
        log "Starting backend Bun process from ${BACKEND_ROOT_EFFECTIVE}/${candidate}."
        (
          cd "/home/container/${BACKEND_ROOT_EFFECTIVE}"
          export PORT="${BACKEND_PORT}"
          export BACKEND_PORT="${BACKEND_PORT}"
          export HOST="0.0.0.0"
          exec bun "$candidate"
        ) > /home/container/.ptero/backend.log 2>&1 &
        return
      fi
    done
  fi

  if [ -f "/home/container/${BACKEND_ROOT_EFFECTIVE}/composer.json" ] || [ -f "/home/container/${BACKEND_ROOT_EFFECTIVE}/index.php" ]; then
    PHP_BIN="$(find_php_bin || true)"
    [ -n "${PHP_BIN}" ] || fail "Backend PHP app detected, but no PHP CLI binary exists in this image."
    DOCROOT="${PHP_DOCROOT:-public}"
    if [ ! -d "/home/container/${BACKEND_ROOT_EFFECTIVE}/${DOCROOT}" ]; then
      DOCROOT="."
    fi
    log "Starting backend PHP process from ${BACKEND_ROOT_EFFECTIVE}."
    (
      cd "/home/container/${BACKEND_ROOT_EFFECTIVE}"
      export PORT="${BACKEND_PORT}"
      export BACKEND_PORT="${BACKEND_PORT}"
      export HOST="0.0.0.0"
      exec "$PHP_BIN" -S "0.0.0.0:${BACKEND_PORT}" -t "$DOCROOT"
    ) > /home/container/.ptero/backend.log 2>&1 &
  _BPID=$!
  sleep 1
  if kill -0 "$_BPID" 2>/dev/null; then
    log "Backend started (PID: ${_BPID}, port: ${BACKEND_PORT:-3001}). Tail: /home/container/.ptero/backend.log"
  else
    warn "Backend exited immediately. First lines:"
    head -20 /home/container/.ptero/backend.log 2>/dev/null | while IFS= read -r _bl; do warn "  [backend] $_bl"; done
  fi
    return
  fi

  warn "Unable to auto-resolve backend startup from ${BACKEND_ROOT_EFFECTIVE}. Set BACKEND_START_CMD if this repo uses a custom backend flow."
}

RUN_PROFILE="$(detect_profile_runtime)"
RUN_PM="$(resolve_js_pm_runtime)"

if [ "$RUN_PROFILE" = "next" ] && has_vite_signature_runtime && [ ! -x "./node_modules/.bin/next" ] && [ ! -f ".next/standalone/server.js" ]; then
  warn "Runtime metadata resolved to next, but the project signatures match Vite/static. Falling back to static profile."
  RUN_PROFILE="static"
fi

if [ -n "${START_CMD_OVERRIDE:-}" ]; then
  start_cloudflared_if_enabled
  log "Using START_CMD_OVERRIDE."
  exec /bin/sh -c "${START_CMD_OVERRIDE}"
fi

ensure_js_runtime_ready
start_cloudflared_if_enabled
start_backend_if_needed

log "Resolved runtime profile: ${RUN_PROFILE}"

case "$RUN_PROFILE" in
  next)
    if [ -f ".next/standalone/server.js" ]; then
      command -v node >/dev/null 2>&1 || fail "Next.js standalone output found, but node is missing in this image."
      exec node .next/standalone/server.js
    fi
    if [ -x "./node_modules/.bin/next" ]; then
      if js_script_exists start && js_script_contains start 'next[[:space:]]+start'; then
        warn "The package start script hardcodes a Next.js start command. Using the local next binary so the Pterodactyl allocation port is enforced."
      fi
      exec ./node_modules/.bin/next start --hostname 0.0.0.0 -p "$APP_EFFECTIVE_PORT"
    fi
    if js_script_exists start; then
      run_js_script "$RUN_PM" start --hostname 0.0.0.0 -p "$APP_EFFECTIVE_PORT"
    fi
    fail "Next.js runtime was detected, but no start script or local next binary was found. Run Reinstall so dependencies are installed, or set START_CMD_OVERRIDE."
    ;;
  node)
    if js_script_exists start; then
      run_js_script "$RUN_PM" start
    fi
    if command -v node >/dev/null 2>&1; then
      for candidate in server.js server.mjs index.js index.mjs app.js app.mjs; do
        if [ -f "$candidate" ]; then
          exec node "$candidate"
        fi
      done
    fi
    fail "Unable to resolve a Node.js startup command. Add a start script or set START_CMD_OVERRIDE."
    ;;
  bun)
    command -v bun >/dev/null 2>&1 || fail "bun profile selected, but bun is missing in this image."
    if js_script_exists start; then
      exec bun run start
    fi
    for candidate in server.ts server.js index.ts index.js app.ts app.js; do
      if [ -f "$candidate" ]; then
        exec bun "$candidate"
      fi
    done
    fail "Unable to resolve a Bun startup command. Add a start script or set START_CMD_OVERRIDE."
    ;;
  laravel)
    PHP_BIN="$(find_php_bin || true)"
    [ -n "${PHP_BIN}" ] || fail "laravel profile selected, but no PHP CLI binary exists in this image."
    [ -f artisan ] || fail "Laravel profile selected, but artisan was not found."
    exec "$PHP_BIN" artisan serve --host=0.0.0.0 --port="$APP_EFFECTIVE_PORT"
    ;;
  php)
    PHP_BIN="$(find_php_bin || true)"
    [ -n "${PHP_BIN}" ] || fail "php profile selected, but no PHP CLI binary exists in this image."
    if [ -f artisan ]; then
      exec "$PHP_BIN" artisan serve --host=0.0.0.0 --port="$APP_EFFECTIVE_PORT"
    fi
    DOCROOT="${PHP_DOCROOT:-public}"
    if [ ! -d "${DOCROOT}" ]; then
      DOCROOT="."
    fi
    exec "$PHP_BIN" -S "0.0.0.0:${APP_EFFECTIVE_PORT}" -t "${DOCROOT}"
    ;;
  static)
    STATIC_ROOT="$(resolve_static_dir_runtime)"
    if [ -n "${STATIC_ROOT}" ] && [ -d "${STATIC_ROOT}" ]; then
      if command -v npx >/dev/null 2>&1; then
        exec npx --yes serve -s "${STATIC_ROOT}" -l "tcp://0.0.0.0:${APP_EFFECTIVE_PORT}"
      fi
      if command -v bunx >/dev/null 2>&1; then
        exec bunx serve -s "${STATIC_ROOT}" -l "tcp://0.0.0.0:${APP_EFFECTIVE_PORT}"
      fi
      PHP_BIN="$(find_php_bin || true)"
      if [ -n "${PHP_BIN}" ]; then
        exec "$PHP_BIN" -S "0.0.0.0:${APP_EFFECTIVE_PORT}" -t "${STATIC_ROOT}"
      fi
      fail "Unable to serve static build output in this image. Use a Node/Bun/PHP image or set START_CMD_OVERRIDE."
    fi
    if js_script_exists preview; then
      run_js_script "$RUN_PM" preview --host 0.0.0.0 --port "$APP_EFFECTIVE_PORT"
    fi
    if command -v npx >/dev/null 2>&1 && grep -qi '"vite"' package.json; then
      exec npx vite preview --host 0.0.0.0 --port "$APP_EFFECTIVE_PORT"
    fi
    fail "Static build output was not found and no preview command is available. Set STATIC_DIR or START_CMD_OVERRIDE."
    ;;
  custom)
    fail "custom profile requires START_CMD_OVERRIDE."
    ;;
  *)
    fail "Unsupported resolved runtime profile '${RUN_PROFILE}'."
    ;;
esac
START_SCRIPT

chmod +x /mnt/server/.ptero/start.sh

log "Phase: bootstrap cloudflared"
ensure_cloudflared_bootstrap || true

cd "/mnt/server/$APP_ROOT_VALUE"

package_has() {
  [ -f package.json ] || return 1
  jq -e --arg pkg "$1" '((.dependencies // {})[$pkg] // (.devDependencies // {})[$pkg] // (.peerDependencies // {})[$pkg] // (.optionalDependencies // {})[$pkg]) != null' package.json >/dev/null 2>&1
}

package_script() {
  [ -f package.json ] || return 0
  jq -r --arg script "$1" '.scripts[$script] // empty' package.json 2>/dev/null
}

script_exists() {
  [ -n "$(package_script "$1")" ]
}

script_contains() {
  local script_value
  script_value="$(package_script "$1")"
  [ -n "$script_value" ] || return 1
  echo "$script_value" | grep -Eiq "$2"
}

has_next_signature() {
  if [ -f next.config.js ] || [ -f next.config.mjs ] || [ -f next.config.ts ] || [ -d app ] || [ -d pages ] || [ -d .next ]; then
    return 0
  fi
  script_contains build '(^|[[:space:][:punct:]])next[[:space:]]+build([[:space:][:punct:]]|$)' && return 0
  script_contains start '(^|[[:space:][:punct:]])next[[:space:]]+start([[:space:][:punct:]]|$)' && return 0
  script_contains dev '(^|[[:space:][:punct:]])next[[:space:]]+dev([[:space:][:punct:]]|$)' && return 0
  return 1
}

has_vite_signature() {
  if [ -f vite.config.js ] || [ -f vite.config.mjs ] || [ -f vite.config.ts ] || [ -f vite.config.cjs ]; then
    return 0
  fi
  package_has "vite" && return 0
  script_contains build '(^|[[:space:][:punct:]])vite[[:space:]]+build([[:space:][:punct:]]|$)' && return 0
  script_contains preview '(^|[[:space:][:punct:]])vite[[:space:]]+preview([[:space:][:punct:]]|$)' && return 0
  return 1
}

detect_profile() {
  if [ "$DEPLOY_PROFILE" != "auto" ]; then
    echo "$DEPLOY_PROFILE"
    return
  fi

  if [ -f artisan ]; then
    echo "laravel"
    return
  fi

  if [ -f package.json ]; then
    if has_vite_signature && script_contains build '(^|[[:space:][:punct:]])vite[[:space:]]+build([[:space:][:punct:]]|$)'; then
      echo "static"
      return
    fi

    if package_has "next" && has_next_signature; then
      echo "next"
      return
    fi

    if package_has "@sveltejs/kit"; then
      if package_has "@sveltejs/adapter-static" && ! script_exists "start"; then
        echo "static"
      else
        echo "node"
      fi
      return
    fi

    if package_has "nuxt" || package_has "nitropack" || package_has "@remix-run/serve" || package_has "@remix-run/node"; then
      echo "node"
      return
    fi

    if package_has "astro"; then
      if package_has "@astrojs/node" || script_exists "start"; then
        echo "node"
      else
        echo "static"
      fi
      return
    fi

    if has_vite_signature; then
      echo "static"
      return
    fi

    if script_exists "start"; then
      echo "node"
      return
    fi

    if script_exists "preview" || package_has "vite"; then
      if script_exists "build" || [ -f index.html ] || [ -d public ]; then
        echo "static"
      else
        echo "node"
      fi
      return
    fi

    echo "node"
    return
  fi

  if [ -f composer.json ] || [ -f index.php ]; then
    echo "php"
    return
  fi

  echo "custom"
}

resolve_js_pm() {
  if [ ! -f package.json ]; then
    echo "none"
    return
  fi

  if [ "$PACKAGE_MANAGER" != "auto" ] && [ "$PACKAGE_MANAGER" != "composer" ]; then
    echo "$PACKAGE_MANAGER"
    return
  fi

  if [ -f bun.lockb ] || [ -f bun.lock ]; then
    echo "bun"
  elif [ -f pnpm-lock.yaml ]; then
    echo "pnpm"
  elif [ -f yarn.lock ]; then
    echo "yarn"
  else
    echo "npm"
  fi
}

resolve_static_dir() {
  if [ "$STATIC_DIR_VALUE" != "auto" ]; then
    echo "$STATIC_DIR_VALUE"
    return
  fi

  for candidate in .vercel/output/static .output/public out dist build build/client .svelte-kit/output/client; do
    if [ -d "$candidate" ]; then
      echo "$candidate"
      return
    fi
  done

  if [ -f package.json ] && ( script_exists "build" || script_exists "preview" ); then
    echo ""
    return
  fi

  if [ ! -f package.json ] && [ -d public ]; then
    echo "public"
    return
  fi

  echo ""
}

ensure_node_toolchain() {
  if command -v node >/dev/null 2>&1 && command -v npm >/dev/null 2>&1; then
    return
  fi

  log "Installing Node.js toolchain..."
  curl -fsSL https://deb.nodesource.com/setup_22.x | bash -
  DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends nodejs

  if command -v corepack >/dev/null 2>&1; then
    corepack enable >/dev/null 2>&1 || true
  fi
}

ensure_bun_toolchain() {
  if command -v bun >/dev/null 2>&1; then
    return
  fi

  log "Installing Bun toolchain..."
  curl -fsSL https://bun.sh/install | bash >/dev/null
  export PATH="$HOME/.bun/bin:$PATH"
}

run_composer_install() {
  if [ -f composer.json ]; then
    log "Installing Composer dependencies..."
    run_with_heartbeat "Composer install" composer install --no-interaction --prefer-dist --optimize-autoloader
  fi
}

run_js_install() {
  local pm="$1"

  case "$pm" in
    none)
      return
      ;;
    npm)
      ensure_node_toolchain
      if [ -f package-lock.json ]; then
        run_with_heartbeat "npm install" bash -lc "npm ci --prefer-offline --no-audit --no-fund || npm install --prefer-offline --no-audit --no-fund"
      else
        run_with_heartbeat "npm install" npm install --prefer-offline --no-audit --no-fund
      fi
      ;;
    pnpm)
      ensure_node_toolchain
      if ! command -v pnpm >/dev/null 2>&1; then
        if command -v corepack >/dev/null 2>&1; then
          corepack enable >/dev/null 2>&1 || true
          corepack prepare pnpm@latest --activate || run_with_heartbeat "pnpm bootstrap" npm install --prefer-offline --no-audit --no-fund -g pnpm
        else
          run_with_heartbeat "pnpm bootstrap" npm install --prefer-offline --no-audit --no-fund -g pnpm
        fi
      fi
      run_with_heartbeat "pnpm install" bash -lc "pnpm install --child-concurrency=1 --network-concurrency=8 --store-dir '$PTERO_PERSIST_CACHE/.pnpm-store' --prefer-offline --frozen-lockfile || pnpm install --child-concurrency=1 --network-concurrency=8 --store-dir '$PTERO_PERSIST_CACHE/.pnpm-store' --prefer-offline"
      ;;
    yarn)
      ensure_node_toolchain
      if ! command -v yarn >/dev/null 2>&1; then
        if command -v corepack >/dev/null 2>&1; then
          corepack enable >/dev/null 2>&1 || true
          corepack prepare yarn@stable --activate || run_with_heartbeat "yarn bootstrap" npm install --prefer-offline --no-audit --no-fund -g yarn
        else
          run_with_heartbeat "yarn bootstrap" npm install --prefer-offline --no-audit --no-fund -g yarn
        fi
      fi
      run_with_heartbeat "yarn install" bash -lc "yarn install --prefer-offline --network-concurrency 8 --frozen-lockfile || yarn install --prefer-offline --network-concurrency 8"
      ;;
    bun)
      ensure_bun_toolchain
      run_with_heartbeat "bun install" bun install
      ;;
    *)
      fail "Unsupported JS package manager '${pm}'."
      ;;
  esac
}

run_default_build() {
  local pm="$1"

  case "$pm" in
    none)
      return
      ;;
    npm)
      run_with_heartbeat "npm build" npm run build
      ;;
    pnpm)
      run_with_heartbeat "pnpm build" pnpm run build
      ;;
    yarn)
      run_with_heartbeat "yarn build" yarn build
      ;;
    bun)
      run_with_heartbeat "bun build" bun run build
      ;;
    *)
      fail "Unsupported JS package manager '${pm}' for build."
      ;;
  esac
}
resolve_js_pm_in_dir() {
  local dir="$1"

  if [ ! -f "$dir/package.json" ]; then
    echo "none"
    return
  fi

  if [ -f "$dir/bun.lockb" ] || [ -f "$dir/bun.lock" ]; then
    echo "bun"
  elif [ -f "$dir/pnpm-lock.yaml" ]; then
    echo "pnpm"
  elif [ -f "$dir/yarn.lock" ]; then
    echo "yarn"
  else
    echo "npm"
  fi
}

install_dependencies_in_dir() {
  local dir="$1"
  [ -d "$dir" ] || return

  if path_is_workspace_root "/mnt/server"; then
      log "Workspace detected at root. Installing dependencies from root instead of $dir."
      (
        cd "/mnt/server"
        local pm
        pm="$(resolve_js_pm_in_dir "/mnt/server")"
        run_js_install "$pm"
      )
  else
      (
        cd "$dir"
        if [ -f composer.json ]; then
          run_composer_install
        fi
        if [ -f package.json ]; then
          local pm
          pm="$(resolve_js_pm_in_dir "$dir")"
          run_js_install "$pm"
        fi
      )
  fi
}

RESOLVED_PROFILE="$(detect_profile)"
RESOLVED_JS_PM="$(resolve_js_pm)"
RESOLVED_STATIC_DIR="$(resolve_static_dir)"

log "Resolved deploy profile: ${RESOLVED_PROFILE}"
if [ "$RESOLVED_JS_PM" != "none" ]; then
  log "Resolved JS package manager: ${RESOLVED_JS_PM}"
fi

log "Phase: install dependencies"
if [ -n "${INSTALL_CMD_OVERRIDE:-}" ]; then
  log "Running INSTALL_CMD_OVERRIDE..."
  run_with_heartbeat "INSTALL_CMD_OVERRIDE" bash -lc "${INSTALL_CMD_OVERRIDE}"
else
  case "$RESOLVED_PROFILE" in
    laravel|php)
      run_composer_install
      if [ -f package.json ]; then
        run_js_install "$RESOLVED_JS_PM"
      fi
      ;;
    next|node|bun|static|custom)
      if [ -f package.json ]; then
        run_js_install "$RESOLVED_JS_PM"
      elif [ "$RESOLVED_PROFILE" != "custom" ]; then
        warn "package.json not found for profile '${RESOLVED_PROFILE}'."
      fi
      if [ "$RESOLVED_PROFILE" = "custom" ] && [ -f composer.json ]; then
        run_composer_install
      fi
      ;;
    *)
      fail "Unsupported resolved profile '${RESOLVED_PROFILE}'."
      ;;
  esac
fi

log "Phase: build application"
if [ -n "${BUILD_CMD:-}" ]; then
  log "Running BUILD_CMD override..."
  run_with_heartbeat "BUILD_CMD" bash -lc "${BUILD_CMD}"
elif [ "$AUTO_BUILD" = "1" ] && [ -f package.json ] && script_exists "build"; then
  log "Running detected build script..."
  run_default_build "$RESOLVED_JS_PM"
else
  log "Skipping automatic build."
fi

if [ -n "$BACKEND_ROOT_VALUE" ] && [ "$BACKEND_ROOT_VALUE" != "$APP_ROOT_VALUE" ]; then
  log "Installing backend dependencies in ${BACKEND_ROOT_VALUE}..."
  install_dependencies_in_dir "/mnt/server/$BACKEND_ROOT_VALUE"
fi

PWA_CHECK_DIR="/mnt/server/$APP_ROOT_VALUE"
if [ -n "$RESOLVED_STATIC_DIR" ] && [ -d "/mnt/server/$APP_ROOT_VALUE/$RESOLVED_STATIC_DIR" ]; then
  PWA_CHECK_DIR="/mnt/server/$APP_ROOT_VALUE/$RESOLVED_STATIC_DIR"
fi
_HAS_MANIFEST=0
_HAS_SW=0
if [ -f "$PWA_CHECK_DIR/manifest.webmanifest" ] || [ -f "$PWA_CHECK_DIR/manifest.json" ]; then
  _HAS_MANIFEST=1
fi
for _sw_candidate in service-worker.js sw.js worker.js firebase-messaging-sw.js; do
  if [ -f "$PWA_CHECK_DIR/$_sw_candidate" ]; then
    _HAS_SW=1; break
  fi
done
if [ "$_HAS_MANIFEST" = "1" ] && [ "$_HAS_SW" = "1" ]; then
  log "PWA ready: manifest + service worker detected in ${PWA_CHECK_DIR}. App will be installable in browser."
elif [ "$_HAS_MANIFEST" = "1" ]; then
  warn "PWA: manifest found but no service worker detected in ${PWA_CHECK_DIR}. App will NOT be installable — add sw.js."
elif [ "$_HAS_SW" = "1" ]; then
  warn "PWA: service worker found but no manifest in ${PWA_CHECK_DIR}."
fi

if [ "$RESOLVED_PROFILE" = "static" ] && [ -z "$RESOLVED_STATIC_DIR" ]; then
  warn "Static build output was not found during install. Runtime will try STATIC_DIR, common build paths, or preview fallback."
fi

log "Phase: finalize metadata"
write_meta_env "$RESOLVED_PROFILE" "$RESOLVED_JS_PM" "$RESOLVED_STATIC_DIR"
write_env_debug

log "Installation complete."

variables.name: Git Repository URL
variables.description: HTTPS Git repository URL. Example: https://github.com/owner/repo.git

variables.name: GitHub Token (PAT)
variables.description: Optional token for private GitHub repositories.

variables.name: Deploy Profile
variables.description: Use auto for detection. Force next, node, bun, laravel, php, static, or custom only when detection is wrong.

variables.name: Package Manager
variables.description: Use auto for lockfile detection. Override only if your repo needs npm, pnpm, yarn, or bun explicitly.

variables.name: App Port
variables.description: Optional override for frontend/app port. Leave empty to use the server allocation port.

variables.name: Backend Port
variables.description: Port for the backend/API process. MUST match the port your backend app uses (check your repo .env BACKEND_PORT or API_PORT). Open a second Pterodactyl port allocation with this same number for public WebSocket/API access. Default: 3001.

variables.name: Database Host
variables.description: Database host. Also exported as DATABASE_HOST at runtime.

variables.name: Database Port
variables.description: Database port. Also exported as DATABASE_PORT at runtime.

variables.name: Database Name
variables.description: Database name. Also exported as DB_DATABASE and DATABASE_NAME at runtime.

variables.name: Database User
variables.description: Database username. Also exported as DB_USERNAME and DATABASE_USER at runtime.

variables.name: Database Password
variables.description: Database password. Also exported as DB_PASSWORD and DATABASE_PASSWORD at runtime.

variables.name: Enable Cloudflare Tunnel
variables.description: Set 1 to auto-run Cloudflare Tunnel on startup. Leave 0 if you are not using Cloudflare Tunnel.

variables.name: Cloudflare Tunnel Token
variables.description: Cloudflare Tunnel token. Only needed when CF_TUNNEL_ENABLE is set to 1.
